subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! Hear thou My call from the precincts of the Prison, that there is no God but Him, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه اسمع ندائی عن شطر السجن بانه لا اله الا هو المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @call to action
